_comment: Placeholder override for the ONNX model zoo's public MobileNetV2 (https://github.com/onnx/models — mobilenetv2-7.onnx). ImageNet 224x224 RGB, 1000-class output. Inference values are unrelated to TANUH's domain — use this only to verify the build/load/preprocessing/decoding pipeline. Replace with the real TANUH override once the actual models land.

params._comment: Labels intentionally absent — argmax-labels falls back to returning classIndex as the label string. Saves shipping a 1000-line ImageNet vocabulary in this placeholder.
